media.organism: Sporomusa ovata (acetogen; grown chemo-/electro-autotrophically on H2:CO2)

components.name: MgCl2·6H2O
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... MgCl2•6 H2O 0.5 g

components.name: KH2PO4 (in component A)
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... KH2PO4 0.2 g

components.name: NH4Cl
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... NH4Cl 0.3 g

components.name: KCl
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... KCl 0.3 g

components.name: CaCl2·2H2O
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... CaCl2•2 H2O 0.015 g

components.name: Resazurin
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... Resazurin 0.25 mg

components.name: Na2S·9H2O
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... Na2S•9H2O 0.048 g; and main text: 'reducing reagents of 0.2 mM Na2S and 0.2 mM cysteine.'

components.name: L-cysteine
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... Cysteine 0.031 g; main text: 'reducing reagents of 0.2 mM Na2S and 0.2 mM cysteine.'

components.name: NaHCO3 (sodium bicarbonate)
components.evidence: Medium component A (per liter) ... NaHCO3 2.52 g; main text: 'CO2 and NaHCO3 as the carbon sources.'

components.name: K2HPO4 (from 10X phosphate stock)
components.evidence: 10X phosphate stock (per liter) ... K2HPO4 10.5 g; 'The 10X phosphate stock was added to the medium component A in a 1:9 volume ratio after autoclaving.'

components.name: NaH2PO4·H2O (from 10X phosphate stock)
components.evidence: 10X phosphate stock (per liter) ... NaH2PO4•H2O 28.14 g (total phosphate buffer ~50 mM per SI Note)

components.name: HCl (25% w/w)
components.concentration: 10 mL/L of trace stock (1 mL stock per L medium)
components.evidence: Trace element solution contained the following (per liter): HCl (25%, w/w), 10 mL

components.name: Na2SeO3·5H2O
components.concentration: 0.006 mg/L final (6 mg/L Se/W stock, 1 mL/L)
components.evidence: Se/W solution contained the following (per liter): Na2SeO3•5H2O, 6 mg

components.name: Biotin
components.concentration: 0.02 mg/L final (20 mg/L vitamin stock, 1 mL/L)
components.evidence: The Wolin's vitamins stock solution contained the following (per liter): biotin, 20 mg

components.name: Thioctic acid (lipoic acid)
components.evidence: Wolin's vitamins ... and thioctic acid, 50 mg

components.name: H2 (hydrogen gas)
components.evidence: The headspace was filled with 1-bar H2:CO2 (80:20, v:v) ... S. ovata utilized H2 as the sole electron donor

components.name: CO2 (carbon dioxide gas)
components.evidence: The headspace was filled with 1-bar H2:CO2 (80:20, v:v) ... CO2 and NaHCO3 as the carbon sources.

media.base_medium: Reduced anaerobic bicarbonate-buffered defined mineral salts medium (Loffler-lab), cited as refs 75 (Loffler, Sanford & Tiedje 1996, Appl. Environ. Microbiol. 62:3809; PMC1388963) and 76 (He et al. 2003, Nature 424:62); full recipe expanded in SI Appendix Supplementary Note 1.
media.base_medium_reference: Loffler et al. 1996 (AEM 62:3809) / He et al. 2003 (Nature 424:62)

sources_chased.what: SI Appendix Supplementary Note 1 (full medium recipe: component A, 10X phosphate stock, trace element solution, Se/W solution, Wolin's vitamins)
sources_chased.how: downloaded pnas.2308373120.sapp.pdf via EuropePMC supplementaryFiles endpoint and read Supplementary Note 1
added: 10X phosphate buffer salts (K2HPO4, KH2PO4, Na2HPO4, NaH2PO4; ~50 mM total)
corrected Mg source to MgCl2 (not MgSO4)
full trace-element solution: FeCl2, CoCl2, MnCl2, ZnCl2, H3BO3, Na2MoO4, NiCl2, CuCl2 (+HCl)
Wolin's vitamins: biotin, folic acid, pyridoxine, riboflavin, thiamine, nicotinic acid, pantothenic acid, B12, PABA, thioctic acid

sources_chased.how: WebFetch of PMC1388963 did not surface the medium table in the accessible text; not required because SI Note 1 fully expands the recipe

missing_before: 10X phosphate buffer salts (K2HPO4, KH2PO4, Na2HPO4·7H2O, NaH2PO4·H2O; ~50 mM buffer)
Na2S·9H2O (sulfide reductant; main text lists it alongside cysteine)
Biotin, folic acid, pyridoxine, riboflavin, thiamine, nicotinic acid, pantothenic acid, vitamin B12, PABA, thioctic acid (Wolin's vitamins)
H2 electron donor and CO2 gas phase
corrections: Mg source is MgCl2·6H2O, NOT MgSO4 — the current record's 'MgSO4' (EX_mg2_e/EX_so4_e) is wrong; there is no sulfate salt in the medium. Sulfur is supplied only by Na2S and cysteine.
Iron is added as FeCl2·4H2O (Fe2+) only; the current 'Iron (Fe3+)' (EX_fe3_e) entry has no source in the recipe.
The current 'CO2' entry mapped to EX_cobalt2_e conflates CO2 gas with cobalt; cobalt is a real component (CoCl2) and CO2 is a real gas-phase component — both are now listed correctly.
media.notes: Sporomusa ovata acetogen medium, strictly anaerobic (H2:CO2 or N2:CO2 headspace, resazurin-monitored, Na2S+cysteine reduced). Recipe fully recovered from SI Appendix Supplementary Note 1: component A + 10X phosphate stock (added 1:9 after separate autoclaving, giving ~50 mM phosphate) + 1 mL/L each of trace-element, Se/W, and Wolin's vitamins stocks. Component-A concentrations are stated per-liter and are diluted ~10% when the phosphate stock is added; reported values are as stated in the recipe. Trace/vitamin concentrations shown as final after 1000x dilution of the 1 mL/L stocks.
